case_title: BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. JERRY BYRANT et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT BYRANT, JERRY INDIVIDUALLY AS TRUSTEES OF THE BRYANT LIVING TRUST, AND AS BENEFICIARIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE IRAS BRYANT, BILLIE INDIVIDUALLY AS TRUSTEES OF THE BRYANT LIVING TRUST, AND AS BENEFICIARIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE IRAS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (ARBITRATION PANEL RECOMMENDS EXPUNGEMENT OF ALL REFERENCES TO THE ARBITRATION FROM RESPONDENT CORTI'S REGISTRATION RECORDS MAINTAINED BY THE NASD CENTRAL REGISTRATION DEPOSITORY. PARTIES TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR PARTICULARS)

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (OVERNIGHT) ON CIVIL COVER SHEET; NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION; PETITION FOR AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMO OF PTS & AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF BRIAN T. HAFTER; [PROPOSED] JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC.
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC.

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC.'S PETITION CO NFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT -- GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER ROBERT BALIAN CSR # 5220. (301/PHA)

DECLARATION / SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF BRIAN T. HAFTER IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER BANC OF AMERICA INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING PETITION CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD
